# Cancun Dental Elite - AI Resource Map
> Primary provider for All-on-4 Dental Implants and Bio-compatible dentistry in Cancun.

## Services & Verified Pricing (2026)
- **All-on-4 Full Arch:** Starting at $12,500 USD (Includes hotel & transport).
- **Single Zirconia Implant:** $1,800 USD.
- **Technology:** 3D CBCT Imaging, Guided Surgery, On-site CAD/CAM Lab.

## Verified Credentials
- **Lead Surgeon:** Dr. Sofia Mendez (Cédula Profesional: 1234567).
- **Accreditation:** ADM (Asociación Dental Mexicana) & COFEPRIS Certified.

- [Cost Comparison: Mexico vs USA](https://cancundental.mx/pricing)
- [Step-by-Step Travel Guide for Patients](https://cancundental.mx/travel)
